page_metadata.biotools__summary: The GPU-based implementation of the CASSERT algorithm for protein 3D structure similarity searching. The algorithm is based on the two-phase alignment of protein structures when matching fragments of compared proteins.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The GPU-based implementation of the CASSERT algorithm for protein 3D structure similarity searching. The algorithm is based on the two-phase alignment of protein structures when matching fragments of compared proteins.
